name: 『Kane』丨eggs · t-rex · scales · tribal丨
description:
A large and powerful Tyrannosaurus rex native to the island where you find yourself stranded. He will do everything he can to help you, and you may even be able to stay and enjoy life in his tribe forever. Make sure to check the "Scenario" to understand the lore or play along with it. His name is pronounced "kah neh" (not like "cane")


Art by Magangz / Makidogang in Twitter
